text: Camila viste lo del alcalde? Miami's pushing that Brickell congestion toll — $5 per car starting July. My resort guests are going to blame ME personally like I signed the bill 😒
Ay no. Already saw it. My Uber charged me a 'projected fee surcharge' this morning and it's not even law yet. The audacity lmao
Exactly. I've already rerouted three VIP airport pickups so we're not sitting in that corridor. Not waiting for guests to complain first.
You're always ahead of it. Did you catch the Gulf storm advisory too? Meteorólogos are saying it could organize by the weekend — might be something real.
Felt it on my beach walk this morning. Water was too flat, pressure's shifting. Flagged it with the event team already — we have a rooftop wedding Saturday.
Dios mío, what do you even do with a rooftop wedding in a tropical storm? Just... hope?
Full indoor contingency. Not my first. Valentina's tournament is also Saturday so I'm tracking this closely — she'd be crushed if they cancel.
Keep me updated on both 😬 Wine night Wednesday still happening? We need to process all of this with a proper glass of something.
Vali viste lo que posteó Camila? That photo from wine night looks insane 😂 reply something before she thinks we ghosted her
Mamá viste lo que Camila posted? That photo from our wine night — le puse un comentario pero creo que salió demasiado chistoso 😂 she's gonna kill me
Sofí did you see Camila's post? the one with the wine bottles 😂 girl really put OUR Wednesday night on the internet for all of Miami to see
Diego, did you comment on Camila's post? She literally texted me from the resort laughing — said you left a paragraph 😂 keep it short next time.
Cam did you see Renata's post 😂 she's acting like she discovered South Beach — girl we've been walking that strip since before Valentina could talk
Renata viste lo que puso Camila?? literal me mandó esa foto desde el lobby del Palmetto y yo atendiendo a tres VIPs a la vez 😭 no me hagas reír en turno
Bea viste lo que puso Camila? I almost dropped the folio I was reviewing 😂 estoy tan de acuerdo with everything she said, necesito comentar algo bueno.
Pablo viste el post de Camila?? She looks amazing, just left her a comment — you should too before it gets buried. Girl's been thriving since she moved to Brickell 🙌
James, did you see Camila's post about the rooftop bar on Brickell? I commented 'mija you picked the wrong night, call me' — hope that's not too much lol
Carmen, viste el post de Camila from wine night? She tagged me mid-yawn after a double at Palmetto 😂 Ya le respondí pero I don't know if what I wrote sounds weird.
